query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "evoarena: tracking memory evolution for robust llm agents in dynamic e" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it directly addresses the core mechanism of "memory evolution" and "long-term retention" for LLM agents in dynamic environments, which is the central topic of the user's referenced work ("EvoArena"). It serves as a foundational position paper (canonical reference) for the specific sub-field of episodic memory frameworks in LLM agents, providing the necessary theoretical baseline for a literature review on this topic.
